User.title: User
User.description: Represents a registered user of the system along with their AI credit state and optional custom API key.

customApiKey.description: User self-provided Gemini API key to avoid consuming system credits

lastDailyReset.description: The date when credits were last reset (YYYY-MM-DD)

users/{userId}.description: User profile collection holding auth context, credit counters, and custom Gemini API keys.
